case_title: KHOURY, SAMI vs. MILLER, CHARLOTTE et al

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, CHARLOTTE
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $144.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUN-26-1995, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, SAMI
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, SAMI AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, CHARLOTTE
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, SAMI AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, CHARLOTTE MCCURY, CATHIE DOES 1 TO 10

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOURY, SAMI SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-16-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-22-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, SAMI KHOURY WILL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION UF 2306 MARKET STREET #405. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY WITH A STAY OF EVICTION TO 6-1-95. DEFENDANT, CHARLOTTE MILLER AGREES TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY 6-1-95. A MONEY JUDGMENT O $1150 IS ALSO AWARDED SAMI KHOURY. A SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $750 SHALL BE APPLIED TO THE MONEY JUDGMENT. IF DEFENDANT MILLER MOVES IN A TIMELY FASHION, RETURNS THE KEYS TO THE PREMISES TO THE LANDLORD, AND LEAVES THE PREMISES IN GOOD CONDITION, AN ADDITIONAL $100 WILL BE CREDITED TO THE AMOUNT OWED. IF DEFENDANT MILLER MEETS ALL TERMS, THIS JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED. IF MORE THAN $100 IS DONE IN DAMAGES TO THE PREMISES, PLAINT MAY PETITION THE COURT FOR UP TO AN ADDITIONAL $750.00.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, CHARLOTTE MCCURY, CATHIE IT IS THE JUDGMENT OF THIS COURT THAT PLTF SAMI KHOURI RECO- VER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2306 MARKET ST #405 S.F, CA. FROM DEFTS CHARLOTTE MILLER & CATHIE MCCURRY. IN ADDITION PLTF TO RECOVER $1825.00 RENT & DAMAGES $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS PURSUANT TO A COST BILL FROM DEFT CATHIE MCCURRY. PLTF SAMI KHOURI TO RECOVER $1100.00 RENT & DAMAGES VS. DEFT CHARLOTTE MILLER $50.00 ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS PURSUANT TO A COST BILL. ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT VS. CHARLOTTE MILLER IS STAYED UNTIL 6/1/95. DEFTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THE FIRST $1100.00 IN RENTS AND DAMAGES, THE FIRST $50.00 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND, AND SHOULD MILLER DEFAULT ON THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENTS SET FORTH, COSTS = $144.00.
